creator: bhargava.marreddy@broadcom.com
text:
Hi Stephen,

No issues with iflib, I wanted it for 100G performance tuning.

IRQ pinning can be used to improve application performance by assigning both interrupt & application-thread (iperf or netperf in my case)'s affinity to specific CPU cores. This allows cache line sharing between the specified interrupt and application threads.

>> There is an open TODO item to enable dynamically 
>> setting gtaskq affinity for each queue
<Chenna> Can you please share BZ number or other reference if any?
